name: Divinity and Variations
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Nut halves (instead of chopped nuts)
6 tablespoons Water (Instead of the 2 tablespoons Preserved-ginger syrup / 1/2 cup water)
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 1 1/2 pounds
1. In a saucepan, mix corn syrup, sugar, salt, and water.
2. Cook, stirring, until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking without stirring until a small amount of the mixture forms a firm ball when dropped in cold water (248°F).
4. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
5. Pour about half the syrup slowly over the whites, beating constantly.
6. Cook the remainder until a small amount forms hard threads in cold water (272°F).
7. Add the remaining syrup to the first mixture and beat until the mixture holds its shape.
8. Add vanilla and nuts; drop by dessert-spoonfuls onto waxed paper or spread in a buttered 9x9x2-inch pan.
9. When firm, cut into squares.
HOLIDAY DIVINITY: Follow the above instructions, adding candied cherries and pineapple with the nuts.
CHOCOLATE DIVINITY: Follow the above instructions, adding chocolate and nuts with vanilla after beating; then beat until well blended.
GINGER DIVINITY: Follow the above instructions, using water and ginger syrup for the liquid. Add diced ginger with the nuts.
